---
title: Container data types
format: 
    pdf: default
    ipynb: default
jupyter: python3
---

## Overview

list set dict tuple

### Mathematical angle
This is a good moment to compare:
- lists with finite sequences,
- tuples with fixed records,
- dictionaries with finite maps.

for strings: 
x[0] x[1:4] 
immutable 
x[0] = "Z"
